message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "requirement": "Confidentiality obligations must be defined and include a duration.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "info",
      "explanation": "The agreement includes clear confidentiality obligations that last for two years post-termination.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 1.1 defines Confidential Information.",
        "Section 1.3 states confidentiality obligations survive for two years after termination."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Indemnification clauses must be present.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "info",
      "explanation": "The agreement includes an indemnification clause protecting both parties.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 2.1 outlines indemnification responsibilities."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Limitation of liability must be specified.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "info",
      "explanation": "The agreement specifies a limitation of liability of $50,000.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 3.1 details the limitation of liability."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Governing law must be stated.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "info",
      "explanation": "The agreement specifies that it is governed by the laws of California.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 4.1 states the governing law."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Data protection compliance must be addressed.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "info",
      "explanation": "The agreement includes a section on data protection compliance.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 6.1 mandates compliance with data protection laws."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed.",
      "confidence": 1.0
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Audit rights must be included.",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "high",
      "explanation": "The agreement does not include any provisions for audit rights.",
      "evidence": [
        "No section in the agreement addresses audit rights."
      ],
      "remediation": "Add a clause that grants audit rights to ensure compliance with confidentiality and data protection obligations.",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Data retention policies must be defined.",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "medium",
      "explanation": "The agreement does not specify how long data should be retained after termination.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 5.1 mentions returning or destroying Confidential Information but lacks a clear retention policy."
      ],
      "remediation": "Include a data retention policy that specifies the duration for which data will be retained post-termination.",
      "confidence": 0.7
    }
  ]
}
